jobs.title: Azure BI & Automation Specialist – Data Engineering & Process Automation
jobs.shortDescription: Hands-on Azure cloud data engineer with strong BI, Power Platform, and process automation experience to drive digitization and intelligence initiatives across service lines, with exposure to M&A domain.
jobs.description: We are looking for an experienced professional to design and deliver end-to-end data, BI, and automation solutions on Microsoft Azure and Power Platform. The role focuses on building scalable cloud/on-prem data pipelines, implementing business intelligence layers, identifying AI opportunities, and driving lean/six-sigma based transformation engagements.
responsibilities: Apply proprietary and industry-leading methodologies to standardize activities across the engagement life cycle for service lines
Implement lean / six sigma frameworks to assess as-is and to-be data/automation maturity and define scope
Build and implement cloud/on-prem solutions for data-driven decision intelligence using ELT techniques, data marts, and BI layers
Develop automation solutions using Microsoft Power Platform suite and identify AI opportunities
Communicate effectively with cross-functional teams across the GCC
Demonstrate strong initiative, high energy, adaptability to new challenges, and ability to manage multiple workstreams
Work both independently and collaboratively with robust communication skills
Provide clear and concise messaging to teammates, clients, and technology personnel
Uphold the firm’s code of ethics and business conduct
requirements: Minimum 3–5 years of related work experience in PL/SQL and Business Intelligence, delivering end-to-end integrated BI solutions
2+ years proven hands-on experience with MS Azure services (Azure Data Factory, Azure Data Explorer, Storage, Data Lake, Synapse Analytics, Analysis Services, Databricks)
Strong experience with BI tools (PowerBI, Alteryx, Tableau etc.) and advanced techniques including Geo-Spatial analysis (Azure Maps, ArcGIS)
Awareness of Azure-based deployment and foundational knowledge of Azure Cognitive Services
Proficiency in Python, NoSQL, and PL/SQL
Good understanding of BI best practices, analysis, visualization, and latest trends
Basic awareness of statistical techniques (linear/non-linear regression, classification, optimization)
Knowledge of data orchestration, ingestion, ELT patterns, and reporting architecture (on-prem & cloud)
Experience in Merger & Acquisition domains (due diligence, deal structuring, financial reporting, value creation, post-merger phases)
Bachelor’s degree in Engineering from a Tier-1 college (Master’s in Business/domain is a plus)
Experience in programming, business intelligence, and enterprise resource systems including data collection and analysis
preferred: Master’s degree in Business or relevant domain
Exposure to Azure Cognitive Services integration with Data Science workflows
Prior experience in consulting / Big4 / professional services environment
